title: Database Connection Timeout
description: The production server is unable to connect to the SQL cluster.

title: Broken Password Reset
description: Users report that the password reset link leads to a 404 error.

title: Logo Alignment Issue
description: The company logo overlaps the navigation bar on mobile devices.

title: API Latency
description: The /users endpoint is taking more than 5 seconds to load.

title: Payment Gateway Failure
description: Transactions are failing during the checkout process.

title: README Documentation Update
description: Need to update the deployment steps in the repository.

title: Memory Leak Found
description: The background worker process is consuming excessive RAM.

title: Homepage Typo
description: Found a spelling error in the footer section.

title: CSV Export Error
description: Exporting the user list results in an empty file.

title: SSL Certificate Expiry
description: The staging environment certificate expires in 48 hours.

title: App Crash on Android 12
description: The application crashes immediately upon startup.

title: Dark Mode Contrast
description: Gray text is not visible against the black background.

title: Feature: Add 2FA
description: Requesting multi-factor authentication for user accounts.

title: Broken Image Links
description: User avatars are not rendering in the dashboard.

title: Search indexing Lag
description: New content takes 30 minutes to appear in search results.
